meta.title: Mntgk — We Build Your Digital Presence
meta.description: Fast, affordable, and professional digital solutions for small businesses. Get online in days, not months.

hero.title: Take Your Business
hero.subtitle: We help small businesses build a complete digital presence — fast, simple, and affordable. No tech skills needed.

services.title: Everything You Need to Go Online
services.subtitle: From website design to getting found on Google — we handle it all so you can focus on your business.

items.title: Website Design & Development
items.description: Beautiful, fast, mobile-friendly websites that turn visitors into customers. Delivered in days, not months.

items.title: Mobile-Friendly Design
items.description: Your website will look perfect on every device — phones, tablets, and desktops. Over 70% of visitors come from mobile.

items.title: SEO Optimization
items.description: Get found on Google when customers search for your business. We optimize your site for maximum visibility.

items.title: Google Maps Setup
items.description: Show up on Google Maps so local customers can find you easily. We set up and optimize your business listing.

items.title: Domain & Hosting
items.description: We handle the technical stuff — domain registration, hosting setup, and SSL certificates. You just approve.

items.title: Ongoing Support
items.description: We don't disappear after launch. Get reliable ongoing support and maintenance to keep your site running smoothly.

services.requestQuoteDesc: Not sure what you need? Tell us about your business and we'll suggest the perfect package.

howItWorks.title: From Zero to Online in 3 Simple Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: We've made the process incredibly simple. No technical knowledge required.

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Business
steps.description: Share your business details, preferences, and goals. A quick call or message is all it takes.

steps.title: We Build Your Digital Presence
steps.description: Our team designs and develops your website, sets up your online profiles, and optimizes everything.

steps.title: Go Live & Grow
steps.description: Your business goes online and starts attracting new customers. We provide ongoing support as you grow.

portfolio.title: Businesses We've Transformed
portfolio.subtitle: See how we've helped real businesses build their digital presence.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Business Owners
testimonials.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it — hear from the businesses we've helped go digital.

cta.title: Ready to Take Your Business Online?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of businesses who've already made the leap. Get started today — it's easier than you think.

about.title: We Exist to Help Small Businesses Succeed Online
about.story: We started Mntgk because we saw too many great small businesses missing out on customers simply because they had no online presence. In today's world, if you're not online, you're invisible.
about.storyP2: Our mission is simple: make it fast, easy, and affordable for any business to get a professional digital presence. No complicated tech, no huge budgets, no waiting months.
about.missionText: To empower every small business with a professional digital presence that drives real results.
about.visionText: A world where no great business goes unnoticed because they lack an online presence.

values.title: Simplicity
values.description: We handle the complexity so you don't have to.

values.title: Speed
values.description: Get online in days, not months. Time is money.

values.title: Trust
values.description: Transparent pricing, reliable support, honest advice.

values.title: Results
values.description: We focus on what matters — more customers for your business.

contact.title: Let's Build Your Digital Presence
contact.subtitle: Ready to get started? Send us a message or chat with us on WhatsApp. We respond fast.

form.name: Your Name
form.success: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us on WhatsApp.

items.question: How long does it take to build a website?
items.answer: Most websites are ready within 5-7 business days. Simple landing pages can be done in 2-3 days.

items.question: How much does a website cost?
items.answer: Our pricing depends on your needs. Contact us for a free quote — we have packages for every budget.

items.question: Do I need any technical knowledge?
items.answer: Absolutely not! We handle everything from start to finish. You just tell us about your business and approve the design.

items.question: Will my website work on mobile phones?
items.answer: Yes! All our websites are mobile-first and look great on every device — phones, tablets, and desktops.

items.question: Do you provide ongoing support?
items.answer: Yes, we offer ongoing maintenance and support plans. We don't just build and disappear — we're here for the long run.

items.question: Can you help me show up on Google?
items.answer: Absolutely! We include basic SEO optimization and can set up your Google Business profile and Maps listing.

footer.description: Helping small businesses build their digital presence — fast, simple, and affordable.
